rules.currentValue: every change must name one allowed current value source backed by known evidence
rules.firstSufficient: every rung below the selected rung must be rejected once with known evidence
rules.protectedRequirements: verification, evidence, safety, and the documented engineering boundaries cannot be filtered out
rules.bypass: only a scoped, approved, unexpired, unreplayed A05 authority event covering value-source, lower-rung, and all required trace evidence may bypass a value or rung rejection
rules.modes: report_only retains rejection traces without blocking; enforce blocks when any rejection remains
